title: postapiauthregistershouldregisternewtenantanduser
description: Test POST /api/auth/register with valid email, password, and tenantName to ensure it creates a new user and tenant, returning 201 with the created objects including tenant_id.

title: postapiauthloginshouldauthenticateuserandreturnjwttoken
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials to verify it returns 200 with a JWT token containing tenant_id and the user object.

title: getapiauthmeshouldreturncurrentuserprofile
description: Test GET /api/auth/me with a valid Authorization Bearer token to ensure it returns 200 with the user profile including tenant_id.

title: postapiclientsshouldcreateclientwithtenantidfromtoken
description: Test POST /api/clients with Authorization Bearer token and valid client data to verify it creates a client associated with tenant_id from the token, ignoring any tenant_id in the request body, returning 201 with the created client object.

title: getapiclientsshouldlistclientsforcurrenttenant
description: Test GET /api/clients with Authorization Bearer token to ensure it returns 200 with an array of clients filtered by the tenant_id from the token.

title: postapiroutersshouldaddrouterwithtenantidfromtoken
description: Test POST /api/routers with Authorization Bearer token and valid router data to verify it creates a router associated with tenant_id from the token, returning 201 with the created router object.

title: getapiroutersshouldlistroutersforcurrenttenant
description: Test GET /api/routers with Authorization Bearer token to ensure it returns 200 with an array of routers filtered by tenant_id from the token.

title: tenantisolationmiddlewareshouldenforcetenantidfromtoken
description: Test that all protected endpoints enforce tenant isolation by deriving tenant_id from the JWT token and applying it to database queries, rejecting or ignoring any tenant_id supplied in request bodies or queries.
